subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! The tidings from Hamadán have become a source of joy and delight. Praise be unto God that those faithful friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء اخبار همدان سبب روح و ریحان گشت الحمد لله آن یاران باوفا از
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @praise and encouragement
